segments.text: This is with reference to your insurance. We have decided to go ahead with your proposal, but as a part of the process, we need to conduct a video medical verification, in which I will ask you some verification and medical history questions.

segments.text: This call will be recorded for company's audit and quality purpose.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: It will I will be asking you few questions regarding your insurance application, and this recorded call should take 10 to 12 minutes. I hope we can continue with the call, sir.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kindly note that the replies and the information provided by you on this call relating to your health and habits will be considered as part of your application for insurance, and if the proposal is accepted, it shall form basis of legal contract of insurance between you and Tata AIG Life Insurance. Any incorrect, false statements or replies could have an impact on the contract and may lead to cancellation of the policy before or after issuance.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And this may lead to rejection of the claim later.
